JUDGE MORGAN JURY TRIAL CONTINUED. ALL PRESENT. FINAL ARGUMENTS BY BOTH COUNSEL. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY ON THE LAW OF THE CASE. BAILIFF SWORN, JURY RETIRED TO THE JURY ROOM TO DELIBERATE ON ITS VERDICTS. JURY RETURNED TO COURT WITH THE FOLLOWING SPECIAL VERDICT: JURY FIND THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT NEGLIGENT VERDICT READ & FILED.
